raw_description:
Elegant Accommodations:Shangri-La Jeddah in Jeddah offers luxurious rooms with sea views, balconies, and modern amenities. Each room includes air-conditioning, a private bathroom, and free WiFi.Exceptional Facilities:Guests can enjoy a rooftop swimming pool, spa facilities, sauna, fitness centre, sun terrace, and a family-friendly restaurant. Additional services include massage, yoga, and a hot tub.Prime Location:Located 15 km from King Abdulaziz International Airport, the hotel is an 18-minute walk from Red Sea Mall and 500 metres from Atallah Happy Land Park. Nearby attractions include Floating Mosque and Jeddah Corniche.Guest Satisfaction:Highly rated for its convenient location, attentive staff, and luxurious amenities, Shangri-La Jeddah ensures a comfortable and memorable stay.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.2for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Shangri-La Jeddah. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Free parking.
